Tax Filing Summary 2022: The company filed its federal corporate income tax return for tax year 2022 on April 14, 2023, reflecting taxable income of $11.2 million. Estimated tax payments made throughout 2022 totaled $2.6 million, leaving a balance due of $248,000 upon filing. State tax returns were filed in seven jurisdictions, with total state tax liability of $980,000. All filings have been confirmed as received by the respective tax authorities.
